title: selaginella cinerascens
intro: Selaginella cinerascens is a species of spore-bearing vascular plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as spike moss. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella cinerascens include its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and support immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, Selaginella cinerascens is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
